textByHash.d6fc997a02ea1f42a98c1ae9d7c8f98b9a661215: Good day to you my friend, a beautiful one at that. Would you like some groceries? I have all sorts. Alcohol also, if you're partial to a drink.
textByHash.a01fc77595aa43b1c8cea4cc9a74bb8753899060: Ahh well, all the best to you.
textByHash.6c245d555151996456e95973aaa66bca93cf624e: Hey! Thanks a lot mate. You're a diamond.
textByHash.27da30f10ecba47ace6b39ef4b92b53c7cf8ddad: Please do puzzle for me human!
